case_title: PETER DE CASTRO VS. AIR FRANCE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF AMENDED COMPLAINTS. DISMISSING DEFENDANT AIR FRANCE, ADDING 2 DEFENDANTS, ALSO CHANGING THE AMOUNT OF CLAIM. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE CASTRO, PETER
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY 6, 2011 - NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEPT. 506, JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED.

REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
